selectedImpactSubtext: Measured operating outcomes across platform strategy and execution.
heroHeadline: Senior Product Leader at the intersection of AI, personalization, and experimentation.
heroSubheadline: I operate at the intersection of product strategy, ML systems, and cross-functional execution turning emerging technology into durable business outcomes.
strategicPillarsSubtext: Where strategic intent becomes engineered outcome.

proofMetrics.descriptor: ML-powered personalization platform serving 30M+ monthly users.
In-house TaaS AI platform replacing outsourced vendor ecosystem.
Predictive resource allocation model adopted enterprise-wide.
First WebAR automotive launch experience (2017 Toyota Corolla Hatchback).
End-to-end product design, architecture, and deployment of a multi-tenant field workforce platform.

strategicPillars.headline: Strategy
strategicPillars.subheadline: I design decision systems, not feature roadmaps.
bullets: Tie AI capability to measurable business outcomes
Sequence platform investments against scale and governance constraints
Build business cases that unlock executive funding

strategicPillars.headline: Systems Architecture
strategicPillars.subheadline: I treat platforms as operating models.
bullets: Data as product (internal and third-party integration)
Security and governance embedded from day one

strategicPillars.headline: Execution at Scale
bullets: Lead cross-functional teams across Product, Engineering, Data Science, and Legal
MVPs used to de-risk investment and accelerate adoption

customSections.body: Across enterprise platforms and independent builds, the approach is consistent:
bullets: AI embedded into workflow, not layered on top.
customSections.closingStatement: The result is systems organizations can trust and grow on.
Curiosity is the only skill that never stops scaling.
